title: Kunai
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Displays a counter showing the number of Attacks played in the current turn. Grants 1 Dexterity each time you play a multiple of 3 Attacks in a single turn. Counter resets at the start of each turn and after combat ends.
